parents.subject: LU-7437 utils: continue on errors in lctl {get,set}_param

commit.subject: LU-7713 osd: osd-zfs should serialize destroy vs. others
commit.message:
LU-7713 osd: osd-zfs should serialize destroy vs. others

otherwise we can get unexpected EEXIST from DMU at any time.
sanityn/91 hits this regularly.
